article_meta.title: — News —'Locked And Loaded': Trump Warns U.S

reasoning: Classification direction is correct (Lean Right) with plausible rationale, but key_indicators include quoted/attributed language and one non-phrase meta observation, violating attribution rules. Confidence is slightly high for a moderately biased news report.

custom_reasoning.classification_accuracy: Lean Right is appropriate for a Daily Wire news write-up that frames Trump’s hawkish stance without domestic counterbalance.
custom_reasoning.confidence_calibration: 0.85 is a bit high; signals are clear but not heavily loaded—closer to moderate than overt.
custom_reasoning.reasoning_evidence_quality: Two indicators rely on quoted/attributed content (including a quoted term and paraphrased source claim) and one is a meta observation rather than a specific author phrase.
